items: Identity verified: passport + secondary government ID, biometric match on file
Occupation: former deputy minister of transport (2016-2021); current private investor
Inbound funding of USD 4.2m from disclosed brokerage liquidation
Bank statements corroborate liquidation proceeds over 90 days
Wealth attributed to a 2011 sale of a logistics business (independently documented)
Public filings and audited accounts corroborate sale proceeds
Layered holding via one intermediate holding company; UBO traced to customer at 100%
No nominee arrangement identified; control confirmed
Residence and one funding nexus in a FATF-listed higher-risk jurisdiction
No nexus to a comprehensively sanctioned jurisdiction identified
Two moderate-severity articles alleging past procurement-conflict scrutiny; no charge or conviction found
No financial-crime conviction identified in searched corpus
Primary PEP confirmed (former senior government official)
Sanctions screening: no true match; one adverse-media proximity flag referred for corroboration
Expected: investment inflows/outflows, quarterly, USD 250k-1.5m range
Rationale consistent with disclosed source of funds and wealth
Proposed enhanced monitoring: 6-month review cadence, PEP re-screening, transaction thresholds tuned
